summary: Replacement systems_architect read-only review of the current feat/m6-succession-completion worktree requests changes. The diff preserves the sim-core/protocol/save-format boundary, has no React/Pixi/Electron/Node IO coupling, uses no Math.random/Date.now, and the claimed broad checks pass when rerun. However, two succession completion edge cases remain below the M6 malformed-save/invariant and deterministic-resolution bar: regency outcomes can reference a missing or unavailable regent without semantic rejection, and a valid one-candidate low-support crisis can be resolved into an outcome that the new invariant itself rejects.

tests_run.result: On feat/m6-succession-completion with exactly the six listed modified files: packages/protocol/src/index.ts; packages/save-format/src/index.ts; packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts; packages/sim-core/src/world-state-v0.ts; tests/protocol-command-query-schema.test.ts; tests/sim-core-m3-succession-state-machine.test.ts.

Reviewer rerun from repository root mis-set Vitest root to D:/ and failed importing Vitest from an invalid D:/@id path. This was a reviewer invocation issue; the equivalent repository-root command below passed.
24 test files passed, 184 tests passed. Node emitted the existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning for tests/fixtures/deterministic-rng-worker.ts.
Node/worker-compatible hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd, M4 232f62ab, M5 bf042e42.
format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture:check passed.
Architecture boundaries passed; sim determinism passed; root Vitest 37 files / 285 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file / 4 tests passed.

decisions: REQUEST_CHANGES: packages/sim-core/src/world-state-v0.ts:9352 validates regency successor candidate membership and regent != successor, but it never validates that outcome.regentCharacterId references an existing, alive, non-incapacitated M3 character. packages/save-format/src/index.ts:4716 accepts any positive regentCharacterId, so a malformed save can load semantically with a missing regent reference. Add semantic validation and a negative save/invariant regression.

REQUEST_CHANGES: packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts:7815 can resolve a valid pending crisis with exactly one eligible low-support candidate into disputed outcome fields where rivalCharacterId equals leadingCharacterId at line 7845. The new invariant in packages/sim-core/src/world-state-v0.ts:9380 rejects that same shape, so evaluateResolveSuccession can generate an outcome that only fails at commit validation instead of producing a deterministic valid outcome or structured pre-commit rejection. Cover the one-candidate low-support path.

ACCEPTED AREAS: The diff stays within allowed package/test paths, introduces no new production dependency, does not touch UI/client/Electron/content, and keeps sim-core decoupled from React, Pixi, Electron, Node IO, DOM, real time, and random sources.

ACCEPTED AREAS: M6 legitimacy integration reuses the accepted M6 legitimacy source/profile substrate instead of creating a parallel legitimacy manager; disputed succession is kept as a recognized-order blocker through reason-coded read-model output.
ACCEPTED AREAS: Player and AI still use the same authoritative GameCommand path for record-character-status and resolve-succession; no AI-only hidden command or implicit RPC path was introduced.
risks: Existing automated tests pass but do not cover the malformed regency regent reference path or the one-candidate low-support succession resolution path.
The protocol/save enum additions remain additive within current M6 task scope; no ADR is requested by this review, but repaired tests should keep malformed/future payload rejection evidence explicit.
requested_action: Fix the two listed succession semantic gaps, add focused regressions for malformed regent save/invariant rejection and one-candidate low-support resolution behavior, rerun the affected protocol/save/sim-core/determinism/check/test commands, then return a new REVIEW handoff.
